name: One-Pan Potatoes and Chicken Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potatoes into thin wedges.
2. Microwave the potatoes on high for 8 to 10 minutes until tender.
3. In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over high heat.
4. Add the chicken pieces and brown them for 5 minutes.
5. Add the potato wedges to the skillet and sauté, tossing until the potatoes are lightly browned.
6. Add sliced green onions and teriyaki sauce; continue to toss until heated through.
